kirundi.rainbows_mirages_after_images_color_po: Umukororomvya · ibishushanyo vy'urumuri · amashusho-nyuma · ibara · ikirere ca polarize
kirundi.30_step_by_step_ap_problems: 30+ ibibazo vya AP intambwe ku yindi
kirundi.lasers_vision_color_astronomy_more: Lazeri, kuraba, ibara, ubumenyi bw'inyenyeri + ibindi
kirundi.trivia_records_quotes_safety_data_teac: Ibintu bishimishije · amateka · amagambo · umutekano · amakuru · impanuro zo kwigisha
kirundi.concept_progress_which_questions_you_h: Iterambere ry'iciyumviro + ni ibihe bibazo wamenye
kirundi.angle_exceeds_critical_angle_no_light_: Inguni irenze inguni y'ingenzi. Nta rumuri runyura — vyose bigaragazwa inyuma. Urufatiro rwa fibre optique, kubengerana kwa diyama, periskopi za prism.
kirundi.light_entering_less_dense_medium_refra: Urumuri rwinjira mu kintu coroshe. Umurasire wagonzwe ugonda UVA ku murongo usanzwe — urumuri rwihuta mu kintu coroshe.
kirundi.set_n_n_incidence_angle_and_wavelength: Shiraho n₁, n₂, inguni yo kugwa, n'uburebure bw'umuraba. Hanura aho sisitemu ihindukira iva ku kugonda ija kuri TIR. Nta manota, nta guhishura.
kirundi.your_hypothesis_where_exactly_does_tir: Iciyumviro cawe (TIR itangurira he neza, kandi kuki diyama ikora TIR ikomeye kuruta ikirahuri?)
kirundi.why_is_there_no_critical_angle_when_go: Kuki NTA nguni y'ingenzi iba igihe uva ku coroshe uja ku gikomeye?
kirundi.set_water_air_n_1_33_n_1_00_what_s_the: Shiraho amazi→umwuka (n₁=1.33 n₂=1.00). Inguni y'ingenzi ni iyihe? Kuki amafi abona isi yo hejuru yegeranye mu nkokora?
kirundi.in_a_rainbow_why_does_red_bend_less_th: Mu mukororomvya, kuki umutuku ugonda gake kuruta ubururu? Uhuze na slider y'uburebure bw'umuraba.
kirundi.how_does_a_prism_separate_white_light_: Prism itandukanya gute urumuri rwera nimba uburebure bwose bw'umuraba bukurikiza itegeko rimwe rya Snell?
kirundi.i_can_explain_why_this_n_n_combination: Nshobora gusigura impamvu iri hujwe rya n₁/n₂/θ ritanga iyi miterere yo kugonda.
kirundi.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widget y'ubushakashatsi — nta manota, nta guhishura, nta gusuka ibisubizo. Icitegererezo co gutatana ni icerekana (nka Cauchy yo ku rwego rwa mbere); imikondo nyayo yo gutatana iterwa n'ibikoresho (Sellmeier coefficients).
